titleMain: Full Stack Developer with focus on front-end
titleSub: Hi, I'm Caio Fabio, a Full Stack Developer with focus on front-end specialized in transforming creative ideas into responsive and intuitive digital experiences. With a focus on modern technologies and best practices, my goal is to deliver solutions that delight users and exceed expectations.
aboutContent:
Hi, I'm Caio Fabio, I'm 30 years old, I have a degree in Systems Analysis and Development and I'm currently pursuing a postgraduate degree in Artificial Intelligence and Automation, with the goal of specializing in the development of intelligent and automated solutions.

I'm passionate about technology, cryptocurrencies, Web3, Artificial Intelligence, and automation. My projects focus on creating modern applications that integrate front-end, web systems, and decentralized technologies to develop efficient and innovative solutions.

I've been working as a Full Stack Developer with a focus on front-end for over 3 years, creating functional, scalable, and well-structured interfaces, as well as developing platforms, web apps, and SaaS systems that help companies optimize processes and improve their management.

I was born in Belo Horizonte (MG), Brazil, and currently live in Davenport, Florida (USA). I've been married to Isabella for 4 years and my Christian faith guides my personal and professional values.

In my free time I enjoy gaming, playing the drums, and studying new technologies. My goal is to build projects and businesses through technology that allow me to achieve financial and geographic freedom, traveling the world while continuing to create innovative solutions.
projectOneDescription: Payment Control is a web application developed for Zion JS to track and organize payments received for services rendered to other companies. The platform allows users to record and view earnings, thereby facilitating weekly financial oversight and the monitoring of amounts received for each completed project. The system utilizes organized input fields—where each field captures specific information such as the service date, client company, amount received, and notes—enabling clearer and more structured financial management. Furthermore, the web app enables users to share their payment history via WhatsApp, fostering greater transparency and organization in the financial management of operations.
projectTwoDescription: Bazar Online da Bella is a web platform created for a company in Brazil with the aim of selling used products across various segments. The site works as an online bazaar where users can list and display items such as clothing, accessories, and other second-hand goods in an organized way. The project aims to make selling used products online easier, allowing different types of items to be showcased in one place, helping to reach more buyers and making the selling process simpler and more accessible.
projectTreeDescription: The CleanOS administrative panel is the control center of the operation. In it, supervisors and managers monitor the status of services in real time, organize daily routes, monitor team performance, and record payments. With a clear view of each service, including mandatory photos, schedules, and activity history, the panel enables quick decisions, reduces operational errors, and keeps the entire cleaning operation organized in one place.
projectCleanOSDescription: A platform developed to help cleaning companies manage their operations in a more organized and efficient way. The system allows controlling service routes, tracking teams in real time, recording execution proof with photos, and centralizing service management in a single dashboard. With CleanOS, cleaning companies can optimize processes, increase transparency in operations, and improve quality control of services provided.
letsConnectDescription: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your visions.
